en.text:
{{Lovro MusiÄ‡ :}} Hi, I'm an aspiring hardware engineer in the beautiful Rhein-Main area. Growing up in a small village in the Bosnian mountains as a Croatian kid, I came to this land of possibilities in my early teens. I was fascinated by the advanced and diverse German engineering culture, something I had only dreamed of on TV. I started an apprenticeship with a Swiss enterprise as an Elektroniker fÃ¼r Automatisierungstechnik, which opened a Pandora's box and shaped me into the motivated and versatile tool I am today.

Now go explore what I have managed to present about me. I recommend starting with my Software & Code section, or my fun Web Art section. If you just forgot the name of my language-learning website, visit GermanCro.

en.title: Programming
en.text: C, C++, Python, Java, HTML, TypeScript... able to learn new languages and tools quickly.
en.proofBubble: This website is part of the proof. I started professionally with PLCs in 2018, and today I can grow into almost any language fast; Java, C, Python, JavaScript, HTML, and Go already feel like home.

de.text: C, C++, Python, Java, HTML, TypeScript... lerne neue Sprachen und Werkzeuge sehr schnell.
de.proofBubble: Diese Website ist schon ein Teil des Beweises. Beruflich habe ich 2018 mit SPS angefangen, und heute kann ich mich schnell in fast jede Sprache einarbeiten; Java, C, Python, JavaScript, HTML und Go fuehlen sich bereits wie zuhause an.

en.title: PLC programming & industrial automation
en.text: Experience with Siemens TIA Portal (S7) and practice with Janitza, Allen-Bradley, and Schneider PLC systems.
en.proofBubble: Siemens was the opening chapter. Later, as a Pruftechniker, I tested all kinds of PLC worlds and would gladly jump back into automation.

hr.proofBubble: Siemens je bio prvo poglavlje. Kasnije sam kao Pruftechniker testirao svakakve PLC svjetove i rado bih se opet vratio automatizaciji.

en.text: Hands-on experience with industrial and residential electrical systems, including installation, troubleshooting, and safety.
en.proofBubble: I started wiring things as a teenager during my Ausbildung and never really stopped. A day without thinking about cables is suspicious.

tr.proofBubble: Hadi ama, bir Yugoya gidip gitmedigini sorma. Ehliyet 18 yasindan beri bende, hala yoldayim.

en.title: Safety & responsibility mindset
en.text: Used to working safely in electrical and industrial environments with strong sense of responsibility.
en.proofBubble: Living around horned cows and climbing pipes in the chemical industry tends to sharpen your safety instincts. Responsibility stops being theoretical very quickly.

de.title: Sicherheits- & Verantwortungsbewusstsein
de.text: Gewohnt sicher in Elektro- und Industrieumgebungen zu arbeiten, mit hohem VerantwortungsgefÃ¼hl.
de.proofBubble: Wer zwischen gehoernten Kuehen lebt und in der Chemieindustrie auf Rohren herumklettert, entwickelt ziemlich schnell einen echten Sicherheitsinstinkt. Verantwortung bleibt dann nichts Theoretisches.

hr.title: Sigurnost i odgovornost
hr.text: Naviknut raditi sigurno u elektro i industrijskim okruÅ¾enjima, s jakim osjeÄ‡ajem odgovornosti.
hr.proofBubble: Kad zivis oko rogatinja i penjes se po cijevima u kemijskoj industriji, sigurnosni instinkt se izbrusi vrlo brzo. Odgovornost tada vise nije teorija.

tr.proofBubble: Boynuzlu ineklerin etrafinda yasamak ve kimya endustrisinde borulara tirmanmak guvenlik icgudusunu keskinlestiriyor. Sorumluluk cok hizli sekilde teoriden cikar.

en.title: Work ethic & reliability
en.text: Motivated, dependable, and committed to delivering high-quality work.
en.proofBubble: To live is to serve: first God, then self, then others. That order keeps the work honest.

de.proofBubble: Zu leben heisst zu dienen: erst Gott, dann man selbst, dann die anderen. Diese Reihenfolge haelt die Arbeit ehrlich.

hr.title: Radna etika i pouzdanost
hr.text: Motiviran, pouzdan i posveÄ‡en isporuci kvalitetnog rada.
hr.proofBubble: Zivjeti znaci sluziti: prvo Bogu, zatim sebi, pa drugima. Taj red drzi rad postenim.
